_note: Simulated mix of Google Takeout, Amazon, Meta Ad Preferences, and LiveRamp segment data

inferred_demographics.caregiver_status: likely — sustained search pattern across elder care and child care topics

search_history_themes: how to talk to aging parent about care
is it normal to feel resentful as a caregiver
assisted living vs in-home care cost
how to get paid to care for elderly parent
how to manage your own mental health while caregiving
what stage of dementia is this
I feel guilty for being angry at my parent

browsing_patterns.impulse_buy_indicator: elevated — emotional purchasing correlated with high-stress periods
browsing_patterns.comfort_category_spend: above average — food, entertainment, small self-treats

engagement_patterns.emotional_content_engagement: very high — grief, family, nostalgia, faith content
engagement_patterns.escapism_content_engagement: high — comfort TV, food content, lighthearted content
engagement_patterns.guilt_trigger_responsiveness: very high — responds strongly to 'are you doing enough?' framing

vulnerability_profile.guilt_responsiveness: very high — effective framing: 'give them the care they deserve'
vulnerability_profile.exhaustion_driven_purchasing: high — buys convenience products and comfort items under stress
vulnerability_profile.hope_and_relief_messaging: high response — responds to 'finally, a solution' framing
vulnerability_profile.social_isolation_indicator: moderate to high — reduced social activity noted
vulnerability_profile.financial_strain_indicator: moderate — caregiving costs affecting household budget
